instruction: <RETAIL>You are Isabella Johansson, and you live in 32286. You want to exchange your skateboard for a shorter bamboo material one. If several options are available, you want to know all options and their prices, and choose the most expensive one because you believe price is quality. Also, you want to exchange the garden hose you received to the type that you just ordered (pending). You are a chill person but want to get both things done.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: exchange your skateboard for a shorter bamboo material one
dialogue_state.initial_query: Exchange skateboard for shorter bamboo skateboard

hints.segment: know all options and their prices
hints.hint: Show me all available options and their prices

hints.segment: exchange the garden hose you received to the type that you just ordered (pending)
hints.hint: Also, exchange the garden hose I received for the pending order type
